description: VERIFIED LIVE: 界面新闻 (Jiemian) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links use the /article/ path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to jiemian.com (home or a channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 82 articles — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: jiemian_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 界面新闻 page (home or a channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and url (/article/<id>). VERIFIED (82 articles).
